# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: '2020-11-01'
    name: VirtualNetworkName
    location: location
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx/xx
      subnets:
        - name: subnet1
          properties:
            addressPrefix: xx.xx.xx.xx/xx
            serviceEndpoints:
              - service: Microsoft.Storage
              - service: Microsoft.Sql
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: '2020-11-01'
    name: NetworkInterfaceName
    location: location
    properties:
      enableAcceleratedNetworking: false
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            subnet:
              id: subnetResourceId
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: '2020-11-01'
    name: NetworkSecurityGroupName
    location: location
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: AllowInboundAzure
          properties:
            description: Allow inbound traffic from Azure services
            protocol: '*'
            sourceAddressPrefix: AzureServices
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '*'
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            priority: 100
        - name: AllowInboundOnPrem
          properties:
            description: Allow inbound traffic from on-premises
            protocol: '*'
            sourceAddressPrefix: OnPremisesAddress
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '*'
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            priority: 110
        - name: DenyAllInbound
          properties:
            description: Deny all inbound traffic
            protocol: '*'
            sourceAddressPrefix: '*'
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '*'
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            priority: 120
